title: Seven Seas SOLD to AI Manga Company?! Localizers are COOKED!
description:
Western localizers at Seven Seas Entertainment might be cooked. The manga publisher has been sold to Media Do for $80 Million -- and employees weren't told about it until the press release hit! Media Do is all about AI translations to speed up production, so it's likely a lot of Seven Seas translators will get phased out. Remember, Seven Seas has come under fire multiple times for taking "liberties" with translations and censoring manga and light novels -- so much so that they've been forced to reprint some books. This won't end well.

Watch the podcast episodes on YouTube and all major podcast hosts including Spotify.
